skip.vote_description:
There are {count} real members in the voice channel. At least {required} yes votes are needed to skip.
Use the buttons below to vote.
skip.vote_failed: ❌ Vote did not pass, the track will keep playing.
skip.vote_timeout: ⌛ Vote timed out, the track will keep playing.

stop.success: ⏹️ Stopped playback and cleared the queue.

queue.title: 📋 Music Queue
queue.empty: Queue is empty. Add songs with `/play`!

loop.title: 🔁 Loop Mode Changed
loop.invalid: ❌ Invalid loop mode. Use: off, track, or queue.

disconnect.title: 👋 Disconnected
disconnect.success: Bot has left the voice channel and cleared the queue
disconnect.same_channel_required: You must be in the same voice channel

musicnode.title: 🎵 Lavalink Node Status

seek.invalid: ❌ Invalid time format. Use: MM:SS or seconds.

playlist.list_empty: You don't have any saved playlists.

admin.blacklisted: ❌ You are blacklisted from using this bot.

blacklist.owner_only: Only Bot owners can perform global blacklist!
blacklist.add_fail: Failed to add user to blacklist
blacklist.user_not_blacklisted_desc: User **{user}** is not in the blacklist
blacklist.info_not_found: User is not in the {scope} blacklist
blacklist.error_no_permission_desc: You need Administrator permission to use this command!

announcement.current_desc: This server's announcement channel is set to {channel}
announcement.channel_not_found: ⚠️ The configured announcement channel no longer exists or was deleted
announcement.reset_hint: Use `/announcement 設定 #channel` to reconfigure the announcement channel
announcement.not_set_desc: This server has not set up a channel to receive official announcements
announcement.how_to_set: Use `/announcement set #channel` to configure an announcement channel
announcement.channel_required: Please select a channel to configure!
announcement.no_permission: Bot doesn't have 'Send Messages' or 'Embed Links' permission in channel {channel}. Please configure permissions first.
announcement.set_success_desc: Set {channel} as the channel to receive official announcements
announcement.about_announcements:
• Major bot update notifications
• New feature releases
• Maintenance announcements
• Important system notifications
announcement.test_desc:
This is a test message!

This channel has been successfully configured as the official announcement channel for Ghost Music Bot.
All important updates, new features, maintenance notices, and official announcements will be sent here in the future.
announcement.test_footer: Ghost Music Bot Official Announcement System
announcement.set_fail: An error occurred while configuring the announcement channel. Please try again later.
announcement.not_set_remove: This server has not configured an announcement channel.
announcement.remove_success_desc:
This server will no longer receive official announcements.
To receive announcements again in the future, use `/announcement set #channel`
announcement.remove_fail: An error occurred while removing the announcement channel configuration. Please try again later.

help.title: 🎵 Discord Music Bot
help.description: Modern music bot using Slash Commands
help.music_desc:
• `/play` - Play music
• `/pause` - Pause playback
• `/skip` - Skip track
• `/queue` - View queue
help.utils_desc:
• `/ping` - Check latency
• `/stats` - Bot statistics
• `/info` - Bot information
help.usage_desc: Use `/help music` or `/help utils` for detailed commands
help.footer: 💡 Tip: All commands use Slash Commands. Type / to see all available commands
help.cmd_play_desc: Play music or add to queue

info.title: 🤖 Discord Music Bot
info.description: High-quality music bot using Lavalink technology
info.footer: 💡 Use /help to view all available commands | Developer: Bot Assistant

invite.title: 🔗 Invite Music Bot
invite.permissions_list:
• 📖 Read Messages
• 💬 Send Messages
• 🔗 Embed Links
• 😀 Add Reactions
• 🔊 Connect to Voice
• 🎤 Speak in Voice
• ⚡ Use Slash Commands
invite.preview_desc:
After inviting, you can use in your server:
`/play` Play music
`/help` View all commands
invite.footer: Thank you for choosing our music bot! 🎶
